stories.description: Research: Identify proven digital product models for $1M+ revenue
acceptanceCriteria: Document 5+ successful Gumroad/TemplatesCase studies with exact revenue
Identify target niche with buyer demand and low competition
Define minimum viable audience size needed
Price point analysis: what price ranges actually convert

stories.description: Product Pivot: Convert to proven sellable format
acceptanceCriteria: Product solves specific, painful problem (not generic templates)
Price set at $19-49 (proven conversion range)
Platform: Gumroad (buyer trust, not direct ETH)
Freemium model: free basic tier + paid premium
Hero with clear value proposition above fold
Social proof (real testimonials or trust signals)
Screenshots/videos showing the product in action
Clear CTA with urgency/scarcity

stories.description: Set up Gumroad store with proper configuration
acceptanceCriteria: Gumroad store created with professional branding
Product page with complete marketing copy
Email capture for buyers
Payment processor configured
Email sequence for new subscribers
Social media posts (Twitter, Reddit, HackerNews)
SEO-optimized blog post
Link in bio landing page
Week 1-4 launch strategy with specific actions
Traffic source identification (where buyers are)
Outreach list for influencers/micro-bloggers
KPIs and tracking dashboard
